impact: Cannot evaluate VA letter score ranges, which are primary inclusion criteria in most retinal trials
remediation: Access BCVA data already recorded in OD EHR systems

impact: Cannot evaluate IOP criteria, which are required for all glaucoma trials
remediation: Access IOP data already recorded in OD EHR systems

description: Structured slit lamp / fundus / investigator exam findings
impact: Cannot confirm investigator-assessed diagnoses, media clarity, inflammation status, or disc exam findings
remediation: Access slit lamp exam data already recorded in OD EHR systems

description: Clinical diagnosis codes and investigator-assessed condition confirmation
impact: Cannot confirm clinical diagnosis which is a baseline requirement for nearly all trial enrollment
remediation: Access ICD-10/diagnosis data already recorded in OD EHR systems

impact: Cannot evaluate refractive exclusion criteria or confirm myopia severity
remediation: Access refraction data already recorded in OD EHR systems

impact: Cannot evaluate lens status inclusion/exclusion criteria
remediation: Access lens status data already recorded in OD EHR systems

impact: Cannot confirm diabetes status, which is required for all DME/DR trial enrollment
remediation: Link to hospital/lab EHR systems for lab results

description: General laboratory values (eGFR, liver function, CBC, metabolic panel)
impact: Cannot evaluate systemic safety lab exclusion criteria
Cannot evaluate systemic cardiovascular exclusion criteria
remediation: Link to medical EHR for vitals

description: Systemic medical history (comorbidities, prior systemic medications, surgical history)
impact: Cannot evaluate systemic comorbidity exclusions or prior medication washout criteria
remediation: Link to medical EHR for problem list and medication history

description: Prior ocular and systemic surgical history
impact: Cannot evaluate prior surgery exclusion criteria (e.g., prior vitrectomy, cataract surgery timing)
remediation: Link to medical EHR for surgical records or collect via patient questionnaire

description: Prior ophthalmic treatment history (anti-VEGF, laser, surgery)
impact: Cannot confirm treatment-naive status or washout period compliance
remediation: Collect via patient questionnaire at enrollment
Collect via patient questionnaire at enrollment

impact: Cannot grade DR severity on standard ETDRS scale
remediation: Train validated classifier on CFP + OCT data (potential use of RETFound embeddings)

impact: Cannot evaluate visual field inclusion criteria or confirm functional glaucomatous loss
remediation: Integrate Humphrey or equivalent perimetry feeds; ODs typically do not have perimeters

impact: Cannot evaluate FA-based criteria for CNV leakage or retinal nonperfusion
remediation: Not feasible in primary care optometry setting

description: Quantified geographic atrophy lesion area or reading-center equivalent measurement
impact: Cannot evaluate lesion-size thresholds when protocols specify minimum or maximum GA area
remediation: Add validated lesion measurement workflow, potentially multimodal with FAF support

description: Genetic testing results (e.g., complement factor variants, ABCA4 mutations)
impact: Cannot evaluate genetic inclusion criteria for gene therapy or targeted trials
remediation: Biobank partnerships or central lab referral

impact: Cannot evaluate ERG-based inclusion criteria for retinal dystrophy trials
